summary: Multi-Event Management Platform for hosting and managing college events with role-based access (organizer/participant), team collaboration, event registration, notifications, and winner management
architectural_notes: Database: MongoDB with collections for Users, Events, Teams, Registrations, Notifications
Notification services: Email and WhatsApp mock/integration (Twilio)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner image showing diverse college students collaborating at an event with laptops and teamwork, modern illustration style (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Icon for organizer role showing clipboard with checklist, flat design style in emerald green (icon-organizer.dim_128x128.png)
- Icon for participant role showing people in a group, flat design style in warm orange (icon-participant.dim_128x128.png)
- Empty state illustration for events dashboard showing calendar with sparkles, friendly illustration style (empty-events.dim_400x300.png)

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication with Internet Identity supporting role selection during signup (organizer or participant)
Create organizer admin panel dashboard with event creation, participant tracking, and winner management
Build event creation and management system supporting title, description, date/time, venue/link, and schedules
Implement participant dashboard displaying all available events created by organizers
Build event registration system allowing participants to enroll in events
Implement team creation and management system allowing participants to create teams for events
Build team member invitation system with shareable links for email and WhatsApp
Create winner declaration system allowing organizers to mark winning teams after events conclude
Build participant tracking and analytics dashboard for organizers showing registration counts, team formations, and event statistics
Add export reports functionality for organizers to download participant and event data

Design a cohesive visual theme with a professional, modern academic aesthetic suitable for college event management using a palette of emerald green and warm orange accents on light backgrounds, with clean typography and card-based layouts

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin panel for organizers to create/edit/delete events
Event management with schedules and venue/link information
Participant dashboard to browse and view all events
Team member invitation via email and WhatsApp
Winner declaration system for admins to mark winning teams
Participant tracking and analytics dashboard for admins
Implement notification system for event updates and team invitations (email and WhatsApp mock interfaces)
Develop attendance tracking and check-in management system for organizers
